'''鈭歵h-dh-th''' ('''thadhatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicksilver|quicksilver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicksilver|quicksilver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-dh-th
|-
! Lemma
| thadhatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhathithi|thadhathithi]] || [[word:thadhathiji|thadhathiji]] || [[word:thadhathishi|thadhathishi]] || [[word:thadhathi|thadhathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhathuthuth|thadhathuthuth]] || [[word:thadhathujuj|thadhathujuj]] || [[word:thadhathushush|thadhathushush]] || [[word:thadhath|thadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhathuthu|thadhathuthu]] || [[word:thadhathuju|thadhathuju]] || [[word:thadhathushu|thadhathushu]] || [[word:thadhathu|thadhathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhathufuth|thadhathufuth]] || [[word:thadhathufuj|thadhathufuj]] || [[word:thadhathufush|thadhathufush]] || [[word:thadhathuf|thadhathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhathethe|thadhathethe]] || [[word:thadhatheje|thadhatheje]] || [[word:thadhatheshe|thadhatheshe]] || [[word:thadhathe|thadhathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhathothoth|thadhathothoth]] || [[word:thadhathojoj|thadhathojoj]] || [[word:thadhathoshosh|thadhathoshosh]] || [[word:thadhath|thadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhathotho|thadhathotho]] || [[word:thadhathojo|thadhathojo]] || [[word:thadhathosho|thadhathosho]] || [[word:thadhatho|thadhatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhathofoth|thadhathofoth]] || [[word:thadhathofoj|thadhathofoj]] || [[word:thadhathofosh|thadhathofosh]] || [[word:thadhathof|thadhathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhath忙th忙|thadhath忙th忙]] || [[word:thadhath忙j忙|thadhath忙j忙]] || [[word:thadhath忙sh忙|thadhath忙sh忙]] || [[word:thadhath忙|thadhath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhathathath|thadhathathath]] || [[word:thadhathajaj|thadhathajaj]] || [[word:thadhathashash|thadhathashash]] || [[word:thadhath|thadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhathatha|thadhathatha]] || [[word:thadhathaja|thadhathaja]] || [[word:thadhathasha|thadhathasha]] || [[word:thadhatha|thadhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhathafath|thadhathafath]] || [[word:thadhathafaj|thadhathafaj]] || [[word:thadhathafash|thadhathafash]] || [[word:thadhathaf|thadhathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thadhathasha|thadhathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothadhathasha|gothadhathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithadhathasha|gokithadhathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadhathn眉sha|thadhathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothadhathnkn眉sha|gothadhathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhathn眉sha|gokithadhathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadhathsh毛sha|thadhathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadhathnksh毛sha|gothadhathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadhathsh毛sha|gokithadhathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhathrosha|thadhathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhathnkrosha|gothadhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhathrosha|gokithadhathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhathmusha|thadhathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhathnkmusha|gothadhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhathmusha|gokithadhathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thadhathsherasha|thadhathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothadhathnksherasha|gothadhathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithadhathsherasha|gokithadhathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thadhathngasha|thadhathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothadhathnkngasha|gothadhathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithadhathngasha|gokithadhathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thadhathyasha|thadhathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothadhathnkyasha|gothadhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithadhathyasha|gokithadhathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thadhathyamasha|thadhathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothadhathnkyamasha|gothadhathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithadhathyamasha|gokithadhathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhathn眉sh毛sha|thadhathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhathnkn眉sh毛sha|gothadhathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhathn眉sh毛sha|gokithadhathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhathn眉rosha|thadhathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhathnkn眉rosha|gothadhathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhathn眉rosha|gokithadhathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhathn眉musha|thadhathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhathnkn眉musha|gothadhathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhathn眉musha|gokithadhathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhathsh毛n眉sha|thadhathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhathnksh毛n眉sha|gothadhathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhathsh毛n眉sha|gokithadhathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhathsh毛rosha|thadhathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhathnksh毛rosha|gothadhathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhathsh毛rosha|gokithadhathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhathsh毛musha|thadhathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhathnksh毛musha|gothadhathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhathsh毛musha|gokithadhathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhathron眉sha|thadhathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhathnkron眉sha|gothadhathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhathron眉sha|gokithadhathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhathrosh毛sha|thadhathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhathnkrosh毛sha|gothadhathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhathrosh毛sha|gokithadhathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhathromusha|thadhathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhathnkromusha|gothadhathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhathromusha|gokithadhathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhathmun眉sha|thadhathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhathnkmun眉sha|gothadhathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhathmun眉sha|gokithadhathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhathmush毛sha|thadhathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhathnkmush毛sha|gothadhathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhathmush毛sha|gokithadhathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhathmurosha|thadhathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhathnkmurosha|gothadhathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhathmurosha|gokithadhathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thadhath|thadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙dh忙th|th忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothadhath|hothadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙dh忙th|hoth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothadhath|hohothadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙dh忙th|hohoth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thadhath|n眉thadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙dh忙th|n眉th忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thadhath|n眉n眉thadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙dh忙th|n眉n眉th忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thadhath|n茂thadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙dh忙th|n茂th忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thadhath|n茂n茂thadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙dh忙th|n茂n茂th忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthadhath|luthadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙dh忙th|luth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthadhath|luluthadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙dh忙th|luluth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithadhath|lithadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙dh忙th|lith忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithadhath|lilithadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙dh忙th|lilith忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothadhath|kothadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙dh忙th|koth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothadhath|kokothadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙dh忙th|kokoth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethadhath|kethadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙dh忙th|keth忙dh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethadhath|kekethadhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙dh忙th|keketh忙dh忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
